narrative:
Warren South (precinct in Washington County) has 963 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.4 percentage points.
